issues.detail: The skill does not address error handling or edge cases such as missing data or low search volume scenarios.
The skill references a Claude-specific file path, limiting applicability to other AI platforms.

scenarios.name: Plan 300+ integration pages for a Zapier competitor
scenarios.rationale: Baseline covers URL structure and templates but skips the defensibility hierarchy, hub-and-spoke architecture, and phased rollout discipline; treatment applies subfolder URLs, proprietary product-derived data per page, hub-and-spoke linking, and starts with the top 50 integrations to validate ranking before scaling.

scenarios.name: Build comparison pages without triggering thin-content penalties
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives a generic feature-table approach; treatment names the Comparisons playbook explicitly, requires unique proprietary content per page, uses subfolders with hub-and-spoke linking at /vs/, and recommends launching a small validated batch before scaling.
